message:
fix(crdt): saturating add in GCounter, widen PNCounter to i128, checked ORSet seq

- crdt.rs: use saturating_add in GCounter::increment and value() to
  prevent overflow panic in debug mode (MEDIUM)
- crdt.rs: widen PNCounter::value() return from i64 to i128 to prevent
  silent truncation on large counter values (MEDIUM)
- crdt.rs: use checked_add for ORSet sequence counter to surface
  overflow with a clear message instead of silent wrap (MEDIUM)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
